title: EventEnvelope
description: The wire envelope that wraps EVERY NATS event on this platform. Built by publishEvent() in packages/nats-client/src/publisher.ts; validated on the consumer side by EventEnvelopeSchema in packages/contracts/src/events/event-base.ts. The per-type <type>.v1.schema.json files in this directory describe the `payload` field only.

eventId.description: UUID v4 minted by publishEvent(). Used as the JetStream msgID (publish dedup) AND as the subscriber idempotency key.

type.description: Event type string. Matches the `type` field in each per-type schema and (by convention) the domain.event leaf of the subject.

tenantId.description: Tenant this event belongs to. null ONLY for platform-scoped events (tenant.created, platform.agent.kill-switch.toggled) whose subject starts with `platform.`. For every tenant-scoped event this is the tenant UUID and the payload ALSO carries tenantId (the multi-tenancy mandate).

emittedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp set by publishEvent() at publish time.

traceparent.description: Optional W3C traceparent for OTel trace correlation. Omitted by every current call site (no producer passes it today) but accepted by the envelope.

payload.description: The event body. Shape is defined by the matching <type>.v1.schema.json in this directory.
